extraction.one_line_summary: NAESEN Oliver won the sprint from a four-man breakaway that gained time through bonus second sprints on the Bosberg golden kilometer, while DE PLUS Laurens secured overall victory.
tactical_patterns: DE PLUS Laurens collected seven bonus seconds across golden kilometer sprints to flip five-second GC deficit into overall victory.
NAESEN Oliver allied with HIRSCHI Marc and VAN AVERMAET Greg to chase DE PLUS after bonus sprint, preventing GC-motivated sitting-in.
WELLENS Tim lost podium by 38 seconds despite green jersey, revealing sprinters struggle when breakaway targets bonus seconds aggressively.
Deceuninck-Quick-Step placed four riders in 100km-forming break, showing willingness to commit numbers when stage suits multiple agendas.

rider_signals.DE PLUS Laurens: positive: converted breakaway bonus opportunities into GC win despite lacking stage-winning speed against NAESEN
rider_signals.NAESEN Oliver: positive: timed final kick perfectly on technical cobbled finish, beat VAN AVERMAET in two-up sprint
rider_signals.HIRSCHI Marc: positive: 20-year-old contested bonus sprints aggressively and finished fifth, showing tactical maturity beyond years
rider_signals.WELLENS Tim: negative: lost 38 seconds and GC podium spot despite green jersey, unable to follow when breakaway attacked
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: neutral: strong throughout but narrowly beaten in sprint, lost podium by one second to WELLENS
